ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery region or country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the region */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code for the region */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO country code for standardized references */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable in the region */,
  "shipping_hub" TEXT /* Name of the main shipping hub in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping option (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping option */,
  "estimated_delivery" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time in a more user-friendly format */,
  "tracking_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if tracking is available for the shipping option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Gifts, Poster Prints, Wall Art) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "weight" REAL /* Average weight of products in the category */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Average dimensions of products in the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping rate */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery region */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping option */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "rate" REAL /* Shipping rate in the region's currency */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity to apply the rate */,
  "max_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum order quantity to apply the rate */,
  "discounted_rate" REAL /* Discounted rate for bulk orders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES shipping_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_times" (
  "lead_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead time */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery region */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping option */,
  "min_days" INTEGER /* Minimum number of days for delivery */,
  "max_days" INTEGER /* Maximum number of days for delivery */,
  "estimated_delivery" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time in a more user-friendly format */,
  "holiday_adjusted" INTEGER /* Indicates if lead times are adjusted for holidays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_times_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_times_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES shipping_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery region */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping option */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Total shipping cost for the order */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion applied to the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount applied to the order */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the order */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES shipping_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of each item in the order */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "discount_eligibility" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is eligible for special discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount for the promotion */,
  "min_order_amount" REAL /* Minimum order amount to apply the promotion */,
  "bulk_order_eligible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion is applicable to bulk orders */,
  "free_shipping" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion includes free shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_promotions" (
  "order_promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order promotion */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion applied to the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount applied to the order from the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_promotions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_promotions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bulk_orders" (
  "bulk_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bulk order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the bulk order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the bulk order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the bulk order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bulk order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery region */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping option */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items in the bulk order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Total shipping cost for the bulk order */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion applied to the bulk order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount applied to the bulk order */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the bulk order */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code for the bulk order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bulk_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bulk_orders_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bulk_orders_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES shipping_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bulk_orders_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bulk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bulk_order_items" (
  "bulk_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bulk order item */,
  "bulk_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bulk order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of each item in the bulk order */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bulk_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bulk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bulk_order_items_bulk_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("bulk_order_id") REFERENCES bulk_orders ("bulk_order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Admin, Manager, Staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the order */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the status was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
